Item_Description:
Part-related fields (
)

As per Om's request, we need to have very similar part-related fields in several forms. Behavior should be the same: manufacturer field, for example, should behave in the same way in different forms, but now there are differences. This PR creates common hook and i18n resource. Migration will be done in the upcoming PRs
